Class BookController

java.lang.Object
org.springdoc.demo.services.book.controller.BookController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/book") public class BookController extends Object
The type Book controller.

  • Method Details

    • findById

      @GetMapping("/{id}") public Book findById(@PathVariable long id)
      Find by id book.
      Parameters:
      id - the id
      Returns:
      the book

    • findBooks

      @GetMapping("/") public Collection<Book> findBooks()
      Find books collection.
      Returns:
      the collection

    • updateBook

      @PutMapping("/{id}") @ResponseStatus(OK) public Book updateBook(@PathVariable("id") String id, @RequestBody Book book)
      Update book book.
      Parameters:
      id - the id
      book - the book
      Returns:
      the book

    • patchBook

      @PatchMapping("/{id}") @ResponseStatus(OK) public Book patchBook(@PathVariable("id") String id, @RequestBody Book book)
      Patch book book.
      Parameters:
      id - the id
      book - the book
      Returns:
      the book

    • postBook

      @PostMapping("/") @ResponseStatus(CREATED) public Book postBook(@NotNull @Valid @RequestBody @NotNull @Valid Book book)
      Post book book.
      Parameters:
      book - the book
      Returns:
      the book

    • headBook

      @RequestMapping(method=HEAD, value="/") @ResponseStatus(OK) public Book headBook()
      Head book book.
      Returns:
      the book

    • deleteBook

      @DeleteMapping("/{id}") @ResponseStatus(OK) public long deleteBook(@PathVariable long id)
      Delete book long.
      Parameters:
      id - the id
      Returns:
      the long
